overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage exploring a gothic castle interior with stone corridors, portraits, and vaulted halls. The player character walks through curved balconies, descends a grand staircase, and enters a grand hall with house banners and suits of armor.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved balcony corridor with portrait gallery

events.description: camera follows the curved path of the balcony, turning slightly left

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved stone balcony, observing the portraits on the walls

notable_agents.action: student in black robes walking ahead along the balcony

entered.detail: curved walkway with stone flooring and gothic architectural details
ornate stone balustrade with pointed arch cutouts
multiple framed portraits hanging on the stone walls
tall narrow window with gothic arch letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a curved stone balcony lined with framed portraits. The player walks along the gothic railing, following a student in robes who walks ahead. Natural light filters through tall arched windows as the camera follows the curved path.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with ribbed vault ceiling

events.description: turns from curved balcony into straight vaulted corridor

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the long corridor with tall arched windows on the left

entered.detail: gothic ribbed vault ceiling with stone arches
series of tall windows with pointed arches allowing bright light
straight passageway with stone walls and floor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the curved balcony into a straight, enclosed corridor with a dramatic ribbed vault ceiling. Tall gothic windows line the left wall, casting natural light onto the stone floor. The corridor is empty as the player moves steadily forward toward a distant archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase leading to great hall

events.description: begins descending the grand stone staircase
enters the large hall with gathered students

agents.ego_description: walking down the grand staircase toward the crowded hall below, passing a large central statue

notable_agents.action: group of students in black robes gathered and walking in the great hall

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with worn steps descending to lower level
tall dark statue of a robed figure with a creature at its base
large open hall with high ceilings and bright light from stained glass

segments.scene_description: The player descends a grand stone staircase featuring a large central statue of a robed figure. The space opens into a vast great hall filled with students in black robes. Bright light streams through distant stained glass windows as the camera approaches the bustling hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: entrance hall with house banners and suits of armor

events.description: passes through large wooden doors into the entrance hall
camera pans upward to view the house banners on the wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance hall, observing the suits of armor and looking up at the house banners

entered.detail: massive carved wooden doors with iron handles and intricate patterns
full suits of medieval armor standing on display along the walls
large hanging banner with letter H and house crests
vertical banners representing different houses with distinct colors and crests
long red carpet with intricate patterns running down the center of the hall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a grand entrance hall through massive wooden doors, leaving the busy great hall behind. The hall features suits of armor flanking a red carpet runner, with large house banners hanging on the stone walls. The camera pans up to admire the Hogwarts banner and house flags suspended high above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle that transitions from intimate, light-filled balconies into a vast, ceremonial entrance hall. It begins by following a robed student along a curved stone balcony lined with framed portraits, where natural light filters through tall arched windows. As the path straightens, the scene shifts into an enclosed corridor with a dramatic ribbed vault ceiling and stone floors before turning toward a grand staircase centered around a large statue of a robed figure. The space then opens into a bustling great hall filled with students and bright light from stained glass windows, which the camera passes through massive wooden doors. Finally, the movement concludes in a grand entrance hall, gliding past suits of armor and a red carpet toward large house banners suspended high above the stone walls.
